data.content: Revised plan: refactor build_prompt_params() and render_prompt_body() signatures to accept resolved Option<&ActionOutputDef> from StepMetadata instead of looking up profile.outputs directly. Update all call sites (poll_claim, action_prompt, test helpers). Add output-conditional sections to ALL prompts including shipment_review.md. Use canonical target names from c8f4. ~85 lines across 9 files, medium complexity. Depends on c8f4 for canonical names.
